product.name: ArGiyim L
product.familyDescriptorPl: Denim i ripstop na odzież outdoor
product.familyDescriptorEn: Denim and ripstop for outdoor wear
product.categorySourceGroup: Ripstop, elasthane and denim fabrics for outdoor wear.
product.titleDescriptor: 70% Cotton 22% Polyester 8% Elasthane 2/1S Twill Fabric, 220 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 220 g/m², 70% Cotton 22% Polyester 8% Elasthane, 2/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArGiyim L is elasthane 220 g/m² fabric, it creates extra comfort to the user by high stretch function. The fabric can be stretched easliy during hard work conditions. ArGiyim L is the most requested fabric for elastic medical wear scrubs and pants.
70% Cotton 22% Polyester 8% Elasthane 2/1S Twill Fabric, 220 g/m²
70% Cotton 22% Polyester 8% Elasthane 2/1S Twill Fabric, 220 gr/m'2
220 g/m², 70% Cotton 22% Polyester 8% Elasthane, 2/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 70% Cotton (CO) 22% Polyester (Pes) 8% Elasthane (EL) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>800N; Weft>600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>20N; Weft>15N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 2-3 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: ArGiyim L is the most requested fabric for elastic medical wear scrubs and pants.
acceptedMatches.rationale: Description explicitly states the fabric is most requested for medical scrubs and pants, directly linking it to medical apparel use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Stretch comfort property could suggest athletic wear, but no explicit sport use is stated.

evidence: ArGiyim L is the most requested fabric for elastic medical wear scrubs and pants.
primary.rationale: The product description explicitly and directly states this fabric is most requested for elastic medical wear scrubs and pants, making medical the clear dominant end use.

secondary.rationale: No other explicit end use is stated; sport is only speculative based on stretch property, which is insufficient per rules.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Stretch comfort property is mentioned but no explicit sport or athletic use is stated in the source data.
General term 'hard work conditions' is used but the explicit dominant use is medical scrubs, not generic industrial workwear.
